stemHtml: When spoilers are used on the ground to assist in deceleration, they deflect in which manner?

options.a: Symmetrically to reduce lift, and increase weight on wheels.
options.b: Symmetrically to increase lift, and increase weight on wheels.
options.c: Asymmetrically to increase drag, leading to a shorter landing distance.
options.d: Asymmetrically to decrease drag, leading to a longer landing distance.
